briefing.headline: Your week in ai & technology and technology.
briefing.summary: From your lens as a engineer tracking ai, the desk surfaced 8 stories that matter most to your briefing. Leading threads include: Nvidia posts record profit of $58.3bn amid AI chip boom - Al Jazeera; Circular AI Boom Goes Global as Asia Windfall Funds Hyperscalers. Prioritize what changes decisions you own; treat the rest as peripheral scan.
briefing.keySignal: Dominant theme · AI & Technology leads the week; technology remains a secondary thread.
